description: Lock the 2026-07-03 correction of longitude_prize_systems to the 1714 Longitude Act and Board of Longitude public reward, funding, testing, and evaluation system.

checks.reason: The date remains anchored to the 1714 Longitude Act establishing the Board and public reward process.
Marine-clock proposals and Harrison's trials were source-backed practical solution classes evaluated and rewarded by the Board.
Voyage logs and expedition records supported the Board's testing and measurement evidence.
The Board was created by the 1714 Longitude Act and appointed Commissioners to judge, fund, and reward proposals.
Joint-stock companies are private share-capital organizations and are not source-backed as a direct prerequisite for the public statutory prize board.
